arts.ttl: Jack Grealish reflects on 'the most difficult year' of his life after the Man City star struggled to get game time in 2024 and also became a father
arts.sum: On Saturday, Grealish played the full 90 minutes for only the fourth time since October when he helped City beat Leyton Orient in the FA Cup. Afterwards, he reflected on a tough 12 months.

arts.ttl: Guardiola praises fighter and rebel Grealish
arts.sum: Jack Grealish’s fighting spirit was exactly what Manchester City needed to overcome a tough FA Cup test against League One Leyton Orient, says Pep Guardiola. “Both wingers have been outstanding; Savinho and Jack were outstanding, they created chances,” Guardiola said.

arts.ttl: Sevilla 1-4 Barcelona: Player Ratings as Barca Get Within Two Points of Real Madrid in La Liga Title Race
arts.sum: Barcelona took advantage of Real Madrid and Atlético Madrid dropping points to get even closer to the top spot in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Watch: Real Madrid youngster Gonzalo breaks goalscoring record, with 15 games to play
arts.sum: Real Madrid starlet Gonzalo García has on Sunday secured for himself a piece of recent Spanish football history. As much comes owing to his exploits at reserve level. Real Madrid…

arts.ttl: Guardiola challenges Grealish to 'prove me wrong'
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola challenges Jack Grealish to prove him wrong and cement a first-team place after his FA Cup performance against Leyton Orient.

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne delivers Real Madrid advice to Man City team-mates ahead of crunch clash
arts.sum: Manchester City star Kevin De Bruyne insists his side don't have to see off Real Madrid in the first-leg of their Champions League tie on Tuesday as the English side look to oust the champions

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish makes brutal admission on Man City struggles - 'Most difficult time of my life'
arts.sum: Being axed from England’s Euro 2024 squad by Gareth Southgate hit Jack Grealish like a sledgehammer, and it was remarkable that he went through the whole of 2024 without scoring a single goal for Manchester City

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola sends warning to Jack Grealish as he tells Man City star to fight for his future and challenge three players for his place in the team
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW: Pep Guardiola has told Jack Grealish it is time to stand up and fight for his Manchester City future. Grealish impressed his manager against Leyton Orient on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid legend Marcelo retires aged 36
arts.sum: Real Madrid legend Marcelo announces his retirement from football at the age of 36.

arts.ttl: Atletico troll Real Madrid, Henderson feud and the best January transfer reveals
arts.sum: We’ve scoured social media for the best and funniest football posts from the past week (or two). Atletico Madrid had a cheeky dig at Real after their local rivals complained that Spanish referees were biased against them. To make matters even funnier, We want to express our full support and solidarity to the entire team […] The post Atletico troll Real Madrid, Henderson feud and the best January transfer reveals first appeared on The Football Faithful.
